memoryArtifacts.headline: Great Earl of Angus
memoryArtifacts.description: Known as the Great Earl of Angus. He succeeded to the Earldom following the death of his childless brother James Douglas, 3rd Earl of Angus in 1446.[1] He was to become the first Red Chief of Douglas. …

popularStory.headline: Roots of Douglas
popularStory.description: The chief line of the family were the Earls of Douglas which represented the "Black" line, whereas Angus represented the "Red" Line. Both branches were descended through bastardy to William the Hardy, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest於1417年出生時，他的父親William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus19歲，母親Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester17歲。他於1446年之前與Isabel Sibbald在蘇格蘭費伏馬爾金其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1455年被列為warden of the east and middle marches until 1462。他去世於1463年3月12日在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯阿波內享年46歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯阿波內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest于1417年出生时，他的父亲William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus19岁，母亲Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester17岁。他于1446年之前与Isabel Sibbald在苏格兰費伏馬爾金其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1455年被列为warden of the east and middle marches until 1462。他去世于1463年3月12日在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯阿波內享年46岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯阿波內。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest was born in 1417, his father, William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester, was 17. He married Isabel Sibbald before 1446, in Markinch, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. In 1455, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as warden of the east and middle marches until 1462. He died on 12 March 1463, in Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest est né en 1417, son père, William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Sibbald avant 1446, à Markinch, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. En 1455, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est warden of the east and middle marches until 1462. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1463, à Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest 1417 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester 17. Er hat vor 1446 in Markinch, Fife, Scotland Isabel Sibbald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1455, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als warden of the east and middle marches until 1462 aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. März 1463 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forestが1417年に生まれた時，父William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angusは19歳，母Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yesterは17歳であった。1446年以前にスコットランドフィフマーキンチでIsabel Sibbaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1455年，38歳の時，職業はwarden of the east and middle marches until 1462と記録されている。彼は1463年3月12日にイギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスアバーネシーで46歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスアバーネシーにて埋葬された。

ko.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압어네시
ko.lifeSummary: George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest(이)가 1417년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1446년 이전 스컷랜드 피프 마킨치에서 Isabel Sibbald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1455년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 warden of the east and middle marches until 1462이었다. 그는 1463년 3월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압어네시에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압어네시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest nasceu em 1417, seu pai, William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Sibbald antes 1446, em Markinch, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1455, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como warden of the east and middle marches until 1462. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1463, em Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: абирнети, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest родился в 1417 г., его отцу по имени William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Sibbald перед 1446 г. в местности маркинч, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1455 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии warden of the east and middle marches until 1462. Он умер 12 марта 1463 г. в местности абирнети, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности абирнети, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Douglas 4th Earl of Angus, Lord Douglas, Abernethy and Jedburgh Forest nació en 1417, su papá, William Douglas 2nd Earl of Angus, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Elizabeth Hay of Yester, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Isabel Sibbald antes de 1446, en Markinch, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1455, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era warden of the east and middle marches until 1462. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1463, en Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido.
